sections.sectionTitle: Mikaiah in Ahab leh Jehoshafat a Kizawhna ding Genkhol

verses.text: Jehoshafat hau-in hong minthan' ciangin Ahab tawh numei-a kizopna a bawl hi

Kum tawmkhat khit ciangin Samaria-a Ahab kiangah amah paisuk hi. Tua ciangin Ahab in amah leh amah tawh a hong pai mite-a' dingin tuu tampi leh bawngtal tampi go a, Ramothgilead a sim dingin amah a zol hi

Israel kumpipa Ahab in Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat kiangah, “Ramothgilead-ah kei tawh nong kuan ding hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Kei pen nangmah bang ka hi a, ka mite zong nangma mite mah bang ahi hi. Kote pen galsimna-ah nang tawh kong kuan ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “ Topa thu dong masa ni,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in kamsangte mihing za li khawmin amaute kiangah, “Ramothgilead a sim dingin kuanto ding ka hi hiam, tua ahih kei leh thuak ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Kuanto in; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in kumpipa' khutsungah hong pia ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Jehoshafat in, “Eite in i dot theih ding Topa' kamsang adang hih lai-ah om nawnlo ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Eite in Topa thu i dot theihna ding Imlah' tapa Mikaiah a kici mi khat omlai hi. Ahih hangin amah in kei tawh kisai a hoih thu gen ngeiloin a sia bekbek gen tawntung ahih manin amah ka mudah hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in, “Tua bangin kumpipa in ci kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in ulian khat samin, “Imlah' tapa Mikaiah manlang takin hong paipih in,” a ci hi

Tu-in Israel kumpipa leh Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat a kumpi tokhom tung uhah tu-in a puantualpi uh tawh kizem uh hi. Samaria kulhkongpi lutna munah amaute tu uh a, amaute' mai-ah kamsangte khempeuh in thu a gen uh hi
Tua ciangin Khenaanah' tapa Zedekiah in sik kite bawl tawmin, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Amaute a siat matengin hihte tawh Syria mite na nawt ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kamsang khempeuh in zong tua bangmahin gen uh a, “Ramothgilead-ah kuanto in la, gualzo in. Topa in kumpipa' khutsungah hong pia ding hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Mikaiah a sam dingin a pai kamtaipa in ama kiangah, “En in, thu kikhatin kamsangte' thugen pen kumpipa-a' dingin a hoihlam ahi hi. Nang zong amaute' gen bangin gen in la, a hoihlamin gen in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Mikaiah in, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, ka Pasian' gen thu bek ka gen ding hi,” a ci hi

Kumpipa kiangah amah hong tun' ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Mikaiah aw, Ramothgilead-ah galsim dingin kuan ding ka hi hiam, tua ahih kei leh thuak ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Kuanto in la va gualzo ve! Na khutsungah amaute hong kipia ding hi ve'n,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “ Topa' min tawh thudang genloin thuman bek kei tungah nong genna ding bangzah vei hong thuhilh ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in, “A cing neilo tuute bangin mualte tungah Israel mi khempeuh a kithehthang ka mu hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, ‘Hihte in to neilo hi; nuamtakin a inn ciat uhah ciahsak un,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Amah in kei tawh kisai a hoih genloin a sia bek gen ding hi, ci-in nang kiangah hong gen hilo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “ Topa' thugen za in: Topa a kumpi tokhom tungah tu a, a taklam leh a veilamah vantung mihon khempeuh a ding ka mu hi
Tua laitakin Topa in, ‘Israel kumpipa Ahab kuanto-in Ramothgilead-ah a pukna dingin kua in amah zol ding ahi hiam?’ a ci hi. Tua ciangin khat in thu khat gen a, adang khat in thudang khat a gen hi
Tua ciangin kha khat hong madawkin Topa' mai-ah ding a, ‘Keimah in amah ka va zol ding hi,’ a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, ‘Bang lam tawh zol ding na hi hiam?’ a ci hi

Amah in, ‘Keimah paikhia-in ama kamsangte khempeuh' kam sungah zuau thugen kha khat ka va hi ding hi,’ a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Nangmah in amah na va zol ding hi. Pai in la tua bangin va hih in,’ a ci hi
“Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih na kamsangte' kam sungah zuauthu a gen kha khat koih khin ahihna thei in. Topa in nang na siatna ding gen khinzo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Khenaanah' tapa Zedekiah a nai-ah hong pai-in Mikaiah a paang bengin, “Cik huna kipan Topa' kha in kei hong nusia-in, hih bang na genna dingin nang tungah hong tung ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “Nangmah a bu dingin inndei sungnungah na pai ni ciangin na thei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in, “Mikaiah man un la, khuapi ukpa Amon leh kumpipa' tapa Joash kiangah paipih kik un
Tua ciangin, ‘Hih bangin kumpipa in ci hi: Hih mipa thong sungah koih un la, lungnuam takin kong ciahkik mateng an leh tui tawmno bek tawh vak un, ci hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “Lungnuam takin nong ciahkik leh kei tung tawnin Topa in thu a genlo ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Mi khempeuh aw, tu-a ka thugen za un!” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa leh Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat, Ramothgilead-ah a kuanto uh hi

Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Kei pen meel kiseelin gal sungah kong kuan ding a, ahih hangin nangmah in na puantualpite nong silh ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa a meel kiseel a, amaute gal sungah a kuan uh hi
Tu-in Syria kumpipa in a leeng a ukte thu pia khin a, “A neu tawh ahi a, a lian tawh ahi zongin kido loin, Israel kumpipa bek tawh na kido ding uh hi,” a ci hi

Leeng galkap a ukte in Jehoshafat a muh uh ciangin, “Israel kumpipa hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah a hih dingin amaute in naih uh hi. Tua ciangin Jehoshafat kikokhia a, Topa in amah huh hi. Pasian in ama kiang panin amaute kaikhia hi
bang hang hiam cih leh Israel kumpipa ahih lohna leeng galkap a ukte in a theih uh ciangin amah a delhna panin kilehhei kik uh hi

Ahih hangin mi khat in a thal mawklot a, Israel kumpipa a galdal thep leh a awmdal kikal a kha hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a leenghawlpa kiangah, “Kei liam ka hih manin kileh in la, galphual panin hong puakhia in,” a ci hi
Tua ni-in galkidona nasia mahmah a, nitak dong Syria mite maingatin a leeng sungah Israel kumpipa kingam hi. Tua hi a, nitum laitakin amah a si ta hi.
